title: Not implemented pure virtual method does not prevent compilation

features.name: abstract virtual class with pure virtual function
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration with a pure virtual function method that has no implementation

features.name: derived class extending abstract without implementing pure virtual
features.description: Code should include a class that extends an abstract virtual class but fails to implement all pure virtual methods

features.name: construction of class with unimplemented pure virtual methods
features.description: Code should include instantiation via new() of a class that has not implemented all pure virtual methods from its abstract parent

features.name: calling unimplemented pure virtual method on object
features.description: Code should include a call to a pure virtual method that was declared but never implemented in the derived class
